objective: Create a documented, deterministic Kinect 32-joint to BODY_25-compatible intermediate mapping and render synthetic OpenPose-style pose maps without hardware access.
acceptance_criteria: The mapping explicitly documents every retained, omitted, and synthetic BODY_25 keypoint.
The renderer produces deterministic image output for a fixture.
Tests cover neutral standing, missing joints, and a confidence threshold.
Ambiguous hand and face mappings are documented instead of guessed.
